ID: US-CMP-FE-512
Title: Posting-ready detail and mark-posted action
Status: Done
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
Ticket: CMP-FE-512
Epic: CMP-E5: Claiming, Scheduling, and Posting Execution
---

As a posting owner
I want copy-first posting view and a clear completion action so I can close work quickly.
So claimed content exits active workflow when posted.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Claimed detail emphasizes body copy and assets.
- [ ] Copy-to-clipboard action includes toast confirmation.
- [ ] Mark posted prompts optional URL.
- [ ] Mark posted sets `posted_at`, `status=posted`, `archived_at`.
- [ ] Posted content disappears from active queues immediately.
